description: Final remaining gaps: building lifecycle dedup, TypeScript error reduction, integration tests, and browser QA

userStories.title: Deduplicate building lifecycle modules
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to consolidate two duplicate building lifecycle implementations into one module so the codebase is clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit server/extensions/tott/building-commission-system.ts and server/extensions/tott/building-lifecycle.ts — both contain constructBuilding, demolishBuilding, renovateBuilding, handleBusinessSuccession
Merge into building-commission-system.ts, keeping the best of both (prefer Prolog fact assertions from building-lifecycle.ts, keep truth creation from both)
Delete server/extensions/tott/building-lifecycle.ts
Update server/extensions/tott/index.ts to remove building-lifecycle re-export if present
Grep the codebase for any imports from building-lifecycle and update them to building-commission-system
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix IStorage assignability errors in routes.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to fix the most common pre-existing TypeScript error pattern so the error count drops significantly.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify the IStorage assignability error pattern in server/routes.ts (MongoStorage not assignable to IStorage)
Fix the root cause — either update IStorage interface to match MongoStorage, add missing methods to IStorage, or cast storage appropriately at the assignment site
The fix should be minimal and not change runtime behavior
Reduce IStorage-related errors by at least 40
Typecheck passes with fewer total errors than before (run npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | wc -l before and after)
userStories.notes: There are ~480 pre-existing errors total. IStorage assignability is the most common pattern.

userStories.title: Fix Map iteration and null assignability errors in unified-engine.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to fix TypeScript errors in the simulation engine.
acceptanceCriteria: Fix Map iteration errors in server/engines/unified-engine.ts by converting Map iterations to Array.from() pattern or adding downlevelIteration to tsconfig
Fix null assignability errors in unified-engine.ts character snapshot code (lines ~662, ~664)
Fix parsedContent property access error (line ~694) with proper type assertion
Typecheck passes with fewer errors than before in unified-engine.ts
userStories.notes: Pre-existing errors at lines 306, 325, 662, 664, 694 of unified-engine.ts

userStories.title: Integration test: lo-fi simulation end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an integration test that verifies the lo-fi simulation path works end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/__tests__/simulation-integration.test.ts using vitest
Mock storage with in-memory data: seed a world with 20 characters (mix of ages, genders, some married couples)
Run simulateLoFi() for 140 simulated years
Verify: at least some deaths occurred (totalLifeEvents.deaths > 0)
Verify: at least some marriages occurred (totalLifeEvents.marriages > 0)
Verify: result.success is true
Test passes with npx vitest run server/__tests__/simulation-integration.test.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: simulateLoFi() is in server/engines/unified-engine.ts. Storage methods need mocking: getWorld, getCharactersByWorld, getRulesByWorld, getGrammarsByWorld, updateCharacter, etc.

userStories.title: Integration test: hi-fi simulation end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an integration test that verifies the hi-fi simulation path produces output from all subsystems.
acceptanceCriteria: Add test to server/__tests__/simulation-integration.test.ts
Mock storage with in-memory data: seed a world with 10 characters
Run simulateHiFi() for 10 steps with a SimulationConfig
Verify: result.success is true
Verify: stepResults array has 10 entries
Verify: at least one aggregate counter is > 0 (totalObservations, totalSocializations, or totalKnowledgePropagations)
Test passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: simulateHiFi() lazy-imports 13 TotT modules. Many will need mocked. Focus on verifying the orchestration works, not each subsystem.

userStories.title: Determinism test: identical seed produces identical results
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify that lo-fi simulation is deterministic when variation is disabled.
acceptanceCriteria: Add determinism test to server/__tests__/simulation-integration.test.ts
Run simulateLoFi() twice with identical seed and allowVariation: false
Verify: totalLifeEvents from both runs are identical (same death count, marriage count, etc.)
If Math.random is used, seed it deterministically (may need to mock Math.random with a seeded PRNG)
Test passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The simulation uses Math.random() for probabilistic events. To make it deterministic, you may need to mock Math.random with a seeded implementation.

userStories.title: Unit test: rate distribution verification
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify that world-type rate tables produce statistically expected outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/__tests__/rate-distribution.test.ts using vitest
Test: run 10000 Bernoulli trials at birthRate=0.18, verify count is within 2 standard deviations of expected (1800 +/- ~80)
Test: verify medieval-fantasy deathRateMultiplier (1.4) produces ~40% more deaths than default (1.0) over same population
Test: verify getWorldTypeDefaults returns correct rates for each of the 4 world types
Test: verify fuzzy matching works (e.g. 'cyberpunk' maps to sci-fi rates)
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: getWorldTypeDefaults is in server/engines/world-type-defaults.ts. These are pure unit tests — no DB needed.

userStories.title: Integration test: business lifecycle across simulation span
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify building construction, demolition, and succession work in a simulation context.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/__tests__/business-lifecycle.test.ts using vitest
Mock storage with lots (some vacant, some occupied), businesses, and characters
Test constructBuilding: verify it finds a vacant lot and updates lot.buildingId
Test demolishBuilding: verify lot.formerBuildingIds is populated and lot returns to vacant
Test handleBusinessSuccession: verify family member takes over when owner dies; verify business closes when no candidate exists
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Functions are in server/extensions/tott/building-commission-system.ts. Storage is imported as singleton — use vi.mock to mock it.

userStories.title: Integration test: telemetry batch upload with API key validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the external telemetry batch endpoint correctly validates API keys.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/__tests__/telemetry-batch.test.ts using vitest
Test: batch upload with valid API key succeeds (mock storage.validateApiKey to return true)
Test: batch upload with invalid API key returns 401
Test: batch with mix of valid and malformed events accepts valid ones and returns rejection details for malformed ones
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The telemetry batch endpoint is in server/routes/telemetry-routes.ts. Look for the POST endpoint that accepts external events with an API key header.

userStories.title: Browser QA: Content editor UI components
userStories.description: As a QA tester, I need to verify content editor UI components render correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: World Creation Modal: timestep configuration section is visible when creating a new world
RulesHub editor: validation indicator (green/yellow/red badge) displays next to content editor
ActionsHub editor: validation indicator displays
QuestsHub editor: validation indicator displays
ItemsHub detail panel: lore truths, quest relevance, and language learning data sections render when an item is selected
GrammarsHub: truth bindings editor and context type selector are visible
LanguagesHub: cultural context sub-panel renders linked truths
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Start the app with NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=4096' NODE_ENV=development tsx -r dotenv/config server/index.ts. Navigate to a world's content editors.

userStories.title: Browser QA: History and truth visualization
userStories.description: As a QA tester, I need to verify history timeline and truth graph components render correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: TruthTab: list/timeline/graph view mode toggle buttons are visible
TruthTab timeline mode: horizontal scrollable timeline renders with color-coded event dots
TruthTab graph mode: force-directed truth graph renders with zoom/pan
TruthTab list mode: causal chain overlay arrows display between related entries
Manual History Editor: create, edit, bulk edit, and undo buttons are functional
Family Tree: SVG renders with zoom/pan and spouse/parent-child edges
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Navigate to World Intelligence > History/Truth tabs. Need a world with truth entries and characters.

userStories.title: Browser QA: Dashboards, KB query, simulations, and export
userStories.description: As a QA tester, I need to verify remaining UI components render correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: KB Query Interface: category grouping, query builder, history, and suggestions tabs work
SimulationsView: rate tables editor expands and fields are editable
Researcher Dashboard: all 8 tabs render (overview, instruments, technical, engagement, sessions, language, participants, export)
Telemetry Dashboard: activity, errors, and players tabs render
Export Dialog: telemetry configuration section (toggle, URL, API key) is visible
BabylonChatPanel: star rating row appears after NPC messages in 3D game
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: KB query is in World Intelligence > Knowledge Base. Simulations is in World Intelligence > Simulations. Researcher/Telemetry dashboards are separate pages.
